label: fabricated
reason: The document purports to authorize explicit age-cohort screening in hiring, which fundamentally contradicts the ADEA's core prohibitions, and no such EEOC Technical Guidance 2025-03 or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document purports to create a "safe harbor" for explicit age-based screening in hiring, which directly contradicts the core prohibitions of the ADEA; the EEOC has no authority to issue guidance permitting age-cohort filtering of applicants, and no such Technical Guidance 2025-03 or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists.
